title: Add ADTRANS search reset functionality to DivisionMonitorWidget
description: Add search input and reset button to filter/delete compare-adtrans results by adjustment transaction name. Users can search for specific adtrans entries and reset/delete them.

files.change: Add adtrans search row, search results table, and reset/delete button to DivisionMonitorWidget._build_ui()

criteria: Search input visible in top controls area
Search filters mismatch/extra rows by adjustment_name
Results displayed in table with adtrans details
Reset button deletes selected/adtrans-matched rows via API

implementation: 1. Add search section below top controls: QLineEdit for adtrans search, Search button
2. Add results table (QTableWidget) with columns: Div, Cat, Emp, Adtrans, Source, Stored, Status, Action
3. Add reset/delete button that calls API to remove selected entries
4. Store compare results in instance variable for search filtering
5. Wire up search button to filter results by adjustment_name contains search text
rationale: Users need to locate specific adjustment transactions and reset/delete them. Without search, they cannot find entries to reset.
